title: Diataxis Structure Document
description: Schema for diataxis.toml — the source of truth for a Diataxis documentation project. Validates the project metadata block and the topic hierarchy with its four quadrants.

project.description: Project-level metadata. Drives the landing page and the overall scoping of the documentation.

description.description: One-line statement of what the documentation covers.

purpose.description: Why the project exists and what problems it solves. Drives the introductory page.

type.description: 'learning-path' for educational material, 'project-docs' for codebase documentation.

audience.description: Who the reader is — skill level, role, context.

prerequisites.description: What the audience is expected to already know.

topics.description: Map of stable topic slug to topic definition. At least one topic is required.

propertyNames.description: Topic slugs must be lowercase, hyphenated, and stable across the life of the project.

topic.description: A topic groups related content across the four Diataxis quadrants.

prerequisites.description: Topic slugs this topic depends on.

order.description: Numeric position in the learning/display sequence.

quadrant.description: A single quadrant entry within a topic. Defines the file, its status, what it must cover, and generation/scoring guidance.

file.description: Path to the content file, relative to the diataxis directory.

covers.description: Specific items this file must address. Each item is a checkable claim used when scoring.

detail.description: Depth, format, and scope guidance — tells the generator and scorer what 'good' looks like.

guidance.description: Free-form notes on do's, don'ts, cross-linking, and revision intent. Must read as coherent prose: no 'REVISION FEEDBACK:' style labels — integrate feedback into the guidance text so it carries forward on regeneration.

exercises.description: Marimo notebook references linked from this file (typically tutorials only). Each entry is either a path string or a table with {file, title?, height?} for per-exercise overrides.

file.description: Path to the marimo notebook, relative to the diataxis directory.

title.description: Display title for the exercise heading. Defaults to a humanized version of the file stem.

height.description: Iframe height in pixels. Defaults to 600.
